body:
Good morning, Alexandria Friends! Happy Hump Day to those that celebrate!

We’re up to 4 sapphic songs turned into scenes! (Here, here, here, and here!) Think I may continue it for a while longer!

Today is just work and dashing. We’ll see what the rest of the week brings. I’m actually off the day job Thursday and Friday and was planning on trying to make that $$$ dashing all day for most of the next few days, so I may be a little more scarce than usual, but on the other hand, I don’t always dash when I plan to, so we’ll see, lol!

I hope you all have a wonderful day! 🖤🖤🖤
